---
name: Feature request
about: A new gameplay mechanic, command, or polish idea
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What's the idea?**
<!-- One or two sentences. -->

**Why does it matter?**
<!-- What problem does this solve? Or what would it add to the experience? -->

**How might it work?**
<!-- Sketch the UX or data model. Be specific about CLI commands, status-line
     changes, or save-file additions. -->

**Out of scope**
<!-- Optional: things you explicitly are NOT proposing. Helps keep scope tight. -->
